## What does this PR do?

Closes #

## Type of change

- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] refactor — code change with no feature/fix
- [ ] test — adding or improving tests
- [ ] chore — maintenance, deps, CI

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests cover all new/changed code paths (coverage gate will enforce this)
- [ ] No secrets or credentials committed
- [ ] `./mvnw clean verify` passes locally
- [ ] New domain exceptions are mapped in `@RestControllerAdvice`
- [ ] Flyway migration added if schema changed
